About Me

I build backends
that scale & secure

I'm a Computer Science graduate focused on backend and Python development. I specialize in building RESTful APIs, designing relational databases, and implementing secure authentication systems with Flask, SQLAlchemy, and PostgreSQL. My goal is to build server-side systems that are reliable, secure, and production-ready.

My approach: design the data model first, build clean and testable API endpoints, and secure every route. Every project has a real user behind it.

Selected Work

Projects that push boundaries

04 Projects
01
Backend Development · 2025

User Management System (V1 → V5)

A progressively built Flask backend system covering user registration and login, password hashing with bcrypt, JWT authentication, full CRUD for users and posts, authorization and access control, and a PostgreSQL-backed production database. Each version added a new layer — from basic CRUD to protected, token-secured routes with input validation and one-to-many relational data modeling.

PythonFlaskSQLAlchemyPostgreSQLJWTbcryptPostman
↗
02
Real-Time Collaboration · 2024

Real-Time 3D Video Call Platform

A next-gen browser-based video conferencing platform where participants interact with live 3D models using hand gestures, built on WebRTC, Three.js, and MediaPipe — powered by a Node.js backend handling signaling and session state.

Node.jsWebRTCThree.jsMediaPipeWebSocket

03
AI-Powered Legal Assistant · 2024

Your Rights AI

India's most comprehensive AI legal assistant — built to empower citizens with instant, accurate knowledge of their rights. Covers Constitutional Articles, IPC/BNS sections, Consumer Protection Act, IT Act, POSH Act, RTI, TPA, Women's Safety, and Tenant Rights. Users can ask questions in English, Hindi, or Tamil and receive structured legal guidance with cited law sections, step-by-step action plans, and direct helpline references. Powered by a full RAG pipeline with FAISS vector search and Gemini 1.5 LLM.

FastAPI RAG Pipeline FAISS Gemini 1.5 Python Multi-language
↗
Nyay AI · Know Your Rights · Main Dashboard
AI Legal Response · Cited Law Sections · Action Plan · Helpline
Home Dashboard · Practice Areas · Multilingual
AI Response · Law Citation · Action Plan
04
AI · Recommendation System · 2024

AI Interior Design Recommendation System

A smart interior design discovery platform powered by TF-IDF content-based filtering and cosine similarity matching. Users set preferences — room type, design style, budget range, colour palette, and material — and the system instantly surfaces personalised furniture and decor recommendations from a curated dataset of 250+ items across 20 design styles, 10 room types, and 7 categories. Includes a full analytics dashboard and a browsable dataset with real-time search and filtering.

Python TF-IDF Cosine Similarity Streamlit Pandas Plotly
